evals.prompt: Generate requirements for version 1.2.0 at apps/inventory/ — add supplier CRUD with multitenancy and REST API.
evals.expected_output: Agent creates requirements.md with objective, stack, data model, ordered features, acceptance criteria; uses artifact-layout paths.

evals.prompt: New greenfield Laravel+React product apps/portal/ version 0.1.0 — auth, dashboard, user management. design-brief.md exists.
evals.expected_output: Agent loads laravel-react profile, orders infra before domain, includes UI/UX section from brief.

evals.prompt: Write requirements for intelligent SaaS chat product with agent-api and SSE streaming.
evals.expected_output: Agent uses intelligent-saas profile, documents three-app architecture and setup features before domain.
